name: Sweetened Condensed Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure 1/2 cup of cold water into a 2-cup glass measure.
2. Stir in the nonfat dry milk powder until smooth.
3. Microwave for almost 1 minute on high or until the mixture is steaming.
4. Stir in the sugar until dissolved.
5. Cool to room temperature.
Yield: 14 ounces of sweetened condensed milk.
